creator: amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
text:
Since no one gave a reason why we don't allow strings in PORTVERSION, in the thread I've created: http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2012-May/074882.html I take it as there's really no reason, so I'm bringing portlint in sync with reality by relaxing its PORTVERSION check to allow strings in there.

Port maintainer (marcus@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99_6 (mode: change, diff: CVS)
